basic_details.job_title: RCB Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB) has released the official Project-JRF Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the RCB Project-JRF Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with an M.Sc. in Life Sciences and NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or an equivalent qualified examination, and a maximum age of 26 years, can apply online until 24-07-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in life sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or equivalent exam cleared with Masters or equivalent degree
qualification.details: M.Sc. in life sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or equivalent exam cleared with Masters or equivalent degree.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RCB Project-JRF Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RCB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download RCB Project-JRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.regional_centre_for_biotechnology_rcb: M.Sc. in life sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or equivalent exam cleared with Masters or equivalent degree

content_sections.heading: RCB JRF Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the RCB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download RCB Project-JRF Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. in life sciences with NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or equivalent exam cleared with Masters or equivalent degree.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RCB Project-JRF Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RCB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RCB Project-JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the RCB Project-JRF recruitment is 24th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project-JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in life sciences and have cleared NET/DBT-JRF/GATE or an equivalent exam, along with a Master's or equivalent degree.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project-JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project-JRF position is 26 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project-JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus 27% HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project-JRF post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project-JRF post at the Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the RCB Project-JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project-JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project-JRF role will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q9. When will the online interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The online interview for shortlisted candidates is scheduled to be conducted on 28th July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB) located?
faq.answer: The Regional Centre for Biotechnology (RCB) is located in Faridabad, Haryana, with the pincode 121001.
